Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Her grip is strong, firm -- well-practiced in the gesture. That makes sense, of course, as a large business magnate like her must meet with tens of people per day.

Line.Text: And all of those would solely judge her on first impressions, or at least that's your understanding of human businesses; Kweebecs probably have their own procedures. Either way, a good handshake goes a long way.
